findings.what_exists: Grievance intake and admin review API endpoint
findings.what_it_does: Handles user grievances about AURA scores or assessment outcomes, allowing users to file and track grievances while admins review and resolve them

summary: The grievance.py file implements a compliant grievance intake and review process, adhering to ISO 10667-2 §7 and the ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION. No bugs or security issues found.
